title: Instructional Resources
description: Conroe ISD's Instructional Resources policy governs how the district selects, approves, and manages the materials used to teach students, including textbooks, digital resources, and other instructional tools. It establishes a process to ensure that learning materials align with state curriculum standards and meet the district's educational goals. Parents and community members can benefit from understanding this policy because it outlines how decisions about classroom materials are made and what standards those materials must meet.
